## Checklist

- [ ] All links in this PR are live and verified
- [ ] Changes are consistent with the existing README style and Voltex Network branding
- [ ] If adding a new project, it has a corresponding repository or is clearly marked as `🚧 Building`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] No sensitive information (keys, credentials, internal URLs) is included
